creator: oh@fixmbr.de
text:
Port multimedia/minitube doesn't install necessary dependencies. I had to install all of the gstreamer plugins, because I have not found any information about it.

I'm not using KDE, nor Gnome, just Fluxbox.

Fix: 

I did install all gstreamer plugins, which isn't a proper solution in my opinion.
How-To-Repeat: Just install multimedia/minitube.
